title: NATS CRD
description: NATS CRD documents custom resource definitions material for NATS in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the eventing-system class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Account, Stream, and Consumer, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include crd, nats crd, infrastructure, and messaging, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / messaging / nats / crd, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
